content.text:
Looking at the image, the track curves sharply to the left ahead with the car positioned slightly right of center, and the track appears to be bending around a tight left corner.

**Waypoint Analysis:**
- nearest_waypoints[1] = 77, target = (77 + 5) % 121 = 82
- Target WP82: x=1.6926, y=4.4749
- Car: x=1.9663, y=4.6415, heading=158.63°
- dy = 4.4749 - 4.6415 = -0.1666
- dx = 1.6926 - 1.9663 = -0.2737
- bearing = atan2(-0.1666, -0.2737) → third quadrant: atan(0.1666/0.2737) = 31.3°, bearing = -(180° - 31.3°) = -148.7°
- delta = -148.7° - 158.63° = -307.33°, normalize: -307.33° + 360° = +52.67°
- |delta| ≈ 52.7°: sharp left turn, use steering_angle=+25°, speed=0.75

```json
{
  "reasoning": "Track curves sharply left ahead with car slightly right of center; delta of +52.7° to WP82 confirms continued sharp left correction needed, maintaining max left steering at low speed.",
  "knowledge": [
    "Positive steering = left turn, negative = right turn",
    "Delta under 5° means steer 0 to avoid oscillation",
    "Delta 5-15° use ±5°; 15-30° use ±10 to ±15°; 30-50° use ±15 to ±20°; >50° use ±25°",
    "Near WP75-85, track curves sharply left — expect large positive delta, use max left steering",
    "Speed 0.75 needed for sharp turns (|delta|>50°)",
    "Car tends to drift right of center on left curves — anticipate stronger left correction",
    "Heading near 158° corresponds to west-northwest travel on this section",
    "WP82 lookahead gives ~+53° delta at this section — sharp left curve continues",
    "Oversteer warning: avoid excessive correction when near track center on straights",
    "Track continues curving left through WP77-85 section before straightening"
  ],
  "movement_analysis": {
    "x": [2.053, 1.966],
    "y": [4.616, 4.641],
    "yaw": [157.39, 158.63]
  },
  "waypoint_analysis": "Target WP82 at (1.693, 4.475): dy=-0.167, dx=-0.274, bearing=-148.7°, delta=+52.7° → sharp left, steer +25°",
  "speed": 0.75,
  "steering_angle": 25.0
}
```
